0.1.2-alpha.description:
Update 0.1.2-alpha:
- Fixed a bug where receiving items would fail when the server is not returning item names for item IDs. 

---

Update 0.1.1-alpha:
- Fixed a bug where connecting multiple times would give items multiple times.
- Fixed a bug where receiving items while offline could void them.
  - This fix will require deletion of the _archipelago.cfg_ inside your Little Witch Nobeta - AP folder when starting a new run. Or alternatively praying at a statue to save the game and thus reset the _archipelago.cfg_. Then reconnecting to AP and starting another new game from the game's menu.
  - To receive the pending items pray at a statue.

---

This is an alpha release of the Archipelago compatible Little Witch Nobeta randomizer based on the randomizer created by [Eveldee](https://github.com/Eveldee/RandomizedWitchNobeta).

I playtested this apworld and all checks should be obtainable. But since it is faster to find any bugs when multiple people are looking for them I welcome anyone to test this out themselves and report any issues you find.

The cat event item has been temporarely disabled and an option to shuffle boss souls has been added.
Entrance randomization is not yet supported by the AP logic. Use it at your own risk.

A setup guide for this can be found [here](https://github.com/danielgruethling/Archipelago/blob/game_lwn/worlds/little_witch_nobeta/docs/setup_en.md).
More information about this world can be found [here](https://github.com/danielgruethling/Archipelago/blob/game_lwn/worlds/little_witch_nobeta/docs/en_Little_Witch_Nobeta.md).
0.1.2-alpha.failed_to_load: module load failed: bad magic number in 'worlds.little_witch_nobeta': b'\xa7\r\r\n'
0.1.2-alpha.title: LWNAP alpha

0.1.3-alpha.description:
Update 0.1.3-alpha:
- Restored compatibility with Archipelago 0.5.1
- Updated Archipelago.MultiClient.Net to version 6.6.0

Some things might still be a bit janky. You **must** delete the archipelago.cfg which gets created in your game directory before starting a new run. Also the player name and/or location name that gets displayed when you receive items will likely be incorrect. But from my testing the items themselves should all be correct.

---

This is an alpha release of the Archipelago compatible Little Witch Nobeta randomizer based on the randomizer created by [Eveldee](https://github.com/Eveldee/RandomizedWitchNobeta).

I playtested this apworld and all checks should be obtainable. But since it is faster to find any bugs when multiple people are looking for them I welcome anyone to test this out themselves and report any issues you find.

The cat event item has been temporarely disabled and an option to shuffle boss souls has been added.
Entrance randomization is not yet supported by the AP logic. Use it at your own risk.

A setup guide for this can be found [here](https://github.com/danielgruethling/Archipelago/blob/game_lwn/worlds/little_witch_nobeta/docs/setup_en.md).
More information about this world can be found [here](https://github.com/danielgruethling/Archipelago/blob/game_lwn/worlds/little_witch_nobeta/docs/en_Little_Witch_Nobeta.md).
0.1.3-alpha.title: LWNAp Alpha 0.1.3

0.1.4.description:
Update 0.1.4-alpha:
- Restored compatibility with Archipelago 0.6.1
- Fixed a bug where games with goal set to magic_master and starting with arcane magic were unbeatable

Some things might still be a bit janky. You **must** delete the archipelago.cfg which gets created in your game directory before starting a new run. Also the player name and/or location name that gets displayed when you receive items will likely be incorrect. But from my testing the items themselves should all be correct.

---

This is an alpha release of the Archipelago compatible Little Witch Nobeta randomizer based on the randomizer created by [Eveldee](https://github.com/Eveldee/RandomizedWitchNobeta).

I welcome anyone to test this out and report any issues you find.

The cat event item has been temporarely disabled and an option to shuffle boss souls has been added.
Entrance randomization is not yet supported by the AP logic. Use it at your own risk.

A setup guide for this can be found [here](https://github.com/danielgruethling/Archipelago/blob/game_lwn/worlds/little_witch_nobeta/docs/setup_en.md).
More information about this world can be found [here](https://github.com/danielgruethling/Archipelago/blob/game_lwn/worlds/little_witch_nobeta/docs/en_Little_Witch_Nobeta.md).
0.1.4.title: LWNAp Alpha 0.1.4-alpha

0.1.5-alpha.description:
Update 0.1.5-alpha:
- Actually restored compatibility with Archipelago 0.6.1
- Fixed a bug where slot and location names were displayed wrong when getting items

The apworld has not changed. Only the game client was updated compared to 0.1.4-alpha.

Some things might still be a bit janky. You **must** delete the archipelago.cfg which gets created in your game directory before starting a new run.

---

This is an alpha release of the Archipelago compatible Little Witch Nobeta randomizer based on the randomizer created by [Eveldee](https://github.com/Eveldee/RandomizedWitchNobeta).

I welcome anyone to test this out and report any issues you find.

The cat event item has been temporarely disabled and an option to shuffle boss souls has been added.
Entrance randomization is not yet supported by the AP logic. Use it at your own risk.

A setup guide for this can be found [here](https://github.com/danielgruethling/Archipelago/blob/game_lwn/worlds/little_witch_nobeta/docs/setup_en.md).
More information about this world can be found [here](https://github.com/danielgruethling/Archipelago/blob/game_lwn/worlds/little_witch_nobeta/docs/en_Little_Witch_Nobeta.md).
0.1.5-alpha.title: LWNAp Alpha 0.1.5-alpha

0.2.0.description:
This is the first release for the new apworld of Little Witch Nobeta AP to use with the new MelonLoader client mod.

From now on the game client mod and the apworld will have seperate releases. For the client mod look [here](https://github.com/danielgruethling/LittleWitchNobetaAP/releases).

For a setup guide look [here](https://github.com/danielgruethling/Archipelago/blob/game_lwn/worlds/little_witch_nobeta/docs/setup_en.md). The links to the player options there only work when you run the web host yourself. Generate a template yaml using the launcher option and set your personal options from there.

Logic is now partially generated from this repo: https://github.com/danielgruethling/NobetaLogic
When you want to PR logic fixes and they go into rules.py, regions.py or locations.py, please PR them there.
0.2.0.title: Little Witch Nobeta apworld 0.2.0-beta

0.2.1.description:
This is version 0.2.1-beta for the new apworld of Little Witch Nobeta AP to use with the new MelonLoader client mod.

0.2.1 changes:
- removed logic requirement for wind in underground start to work around a soft lock
  - game client mod will give the statue there on scene load in a later version. for now there will be a need to perform a [trick jump](https://youtu.be/00QJZCyoTHQ?t=7070) or start with wind
- fixed a bug where defeating Tania would not give the location
- moved the arcane that is started with to start inventory unless no_arcane is on

From now on the game client mod and the apworld will have seperate releases. For the client mod look [here](https://github.com/danielgruethling/LittleWitchNobetaAP/releases).

For a setup guide look [here](https://github.com/danielgruethling/Archipelago/blob/game_lwn/worlds/little_witch_nobeta/docs/setup_en.md). The links to the player options there only work when you run the web host yourself. Generate a template yaml using the launcher option and set your personal options from there.

Logic is now partially generated from this repo: https://github.com/danielgruethling/NobetaLogic
When you want to PR logic fixes and they go into rules.py, regions.py or locations.py, please PR them there.
0.2.1.title: Little Witch Nobeta apworld 0.2.1-beta
